messy_chain_summary: Trustee succession via revocable trust + simultaneous trustee deaths. Lot 224 was purchased in 2015 by Robert F. and Linda L. Silva, financed by a Wells Fargo HELOC two months later, transferred into THE SILVA FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST (established 2007-07-26) in 2017, the HELOC was released in 2023, BOTH trustees Robert and Linda Silva died on the same day with consecutive death-certificate recording numbers (20260141249 + 20260141250 on 2026-03-11), and 9 days later Successor Trustee Richard D. Moore conveyed the property out of the Silva Trust into HIS OWN family trust (MOORE REVOCABLE TRUST, established 2021-08-16) using the ambiguous 'TRST DEED' document code (the same code Maricopa uses for foreclosure trustee's deeds). A name-indexed title plant searching SILVA gets the 2015-2017 chain but misses the 2026 transfer (which only names the trust, not Robert or Linda); searching MOORE gets the new chain but misses the SILVA history; searching businessNames=SILVA+FAMILY+REVOCABLE+TRUST returns 12 mingled instruments because a SECOND, unrelated David+Diana Silva 'Silva Family Revocable Trust' (est. 2016) holds a different parcel. The chain only resolves correctly if you key by APN.
